name: Wild Mushroom Bruschetta
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Cook the garlic and onion until golden brown.
3. Add the mushrooms, thyme, basil, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Stir in a splash of vinegar.
4. Cook the mixture until the mushrooms begin to wilt.
5. Cut the baguette into half-inch slices and toast them lightly.
6. Top the toasted baguette slices with the mushroom mixture and serve.
